name: Ukrainian Shield: Iraq
short_description: Become the commander of Ukrainian forces in a modern RTS about Iraq. Capture territories, call in missile strikes, and lead your army to victory in realistic combat operations.
detailed_description:
Early Access

The game is in early access to allow players to experience the product at an early stage of development. This decision is based on the need for testing and improving the gameplay experience through your feedback. We aim to use this phase to develop the game together with the community. The further development of the game depends on the support we receive from players. Thank you for your trust and understanding!

Feedback about bugs and errors in the game


About the Game

Short Description:

Ukrainian Shield is a modern real-time strategy that immerses you in the world of military conflicts in the Middle East. The game combines a training mission and an endless mode, showcasing high-quality graphics powered by Unreal Engine 5.5 with optimization for low-end PCs. The campaign mode is currently under development, offering exciting new possibilities for deep immersion into a dramatic storyline.

Ukrainian Shield – RTS game in Early Access

Ukrainian Shield immerses you in the world of military operations in Iraq (2003–2008). This unique real-time strategy is developed using Unreal Engine 5.5. The game is optimized for any PC – even low-end systems, allowing you to enjoy high-quality graphics and dynamic gameplay.

Key Features:

  • • Innovative Tactics:
    Control military units in 1v1 battles against AI. Build bases, capture oil rigs, and implement unique strategies to achieve victory.

  • • Modern Graphics and Optimization:
    Unreal Engine 5.5 provides stunning visual effects. Graphic settings allow you to find the perfect balance between quality and performance.

  • • Combat Support System:
    Activate missile strike mode by pressing the "1" key for instant response. Future updates will expand the system to include artillery strikes, missile attacks, and financial support, which will have a significant impact on the course of battle.

  • • Gameplay Expansion:
    Currently, the game offers a training mission and an endless mode, but soon we plan to add a historical mode with missions inspired by key events of military operations in Iraq.

  • • Early Access and Regular Updates:
    We are actively refining mechanics and adding new content to provide you with the most realistic and immersive experience possible.

Dive into the world of strategy and tactics, where every detail of the battlefield matters. Ukrainian Shield is designed for those who appreciate the depth and realism of military operations. Stay tuned for updates and participate in the development of the game – your involvement will help us make the product even better!

Disclaimer:

Thank you for your interest in our game! We would like to emphasize that this is a purely fictional product and bears no relation to real life. Any resemblance to real events or persons is purely coincidental. The game does not promote terrorism in any form and fully condemns violence and any forms of aggression.

We aim to create a fun and engaging game with no intention of offending anyone. Your support and feedback are very important to us – they help us become better. Thank you for your understanding!

Health and Safety Warning

This game contains intense visual effects and rapid image changes that may trigger light flashes.

If you have a history of photosensitive epilepsy or other neurological conditions, be sure to consult a doctor before playing.

The developers are not responsible for any negative health effects.

If you experience discomfort or other unwanted symptoms during gameplay, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian*, Japanese, German
*languages with full audio support
